name: diagram-design
description: A Claude Code skill for creating editorial-quality technical diagrams as standalone HTML files with inline SVG. 13 diagram types with brand-matching.
author: Cathryn Lavery

core_concept.description: Create editorial-quality technical diagrams as self-contained HTML files with inline SVG
core_concept.philosophy: The highest-quality move is usually deletion. Every node earns its place. Target density: 4/10.
core_concept.unique_selling_point: Brand-matching in 60 seconds by reading your website

design_system.colors: Semantic roles (paper, ink, muted, accent, link)
design_system.typography: Instrument Serif (title), Geist sans (node names), Geist Mono (technical)

features: First-run style guide gate - prompts brand customization before first diagram
URL-based onboarding - fetches website, extracts palette + fonts
Progressive disclosure - loads only relevant type reference
Self-contained HTML output - no external images or JS
directory_structure: SKILL.md - top-level: philosophy, selection guide, checklist
references/style-guide.md - single source of truth for colors + fonts
assets/ - gallery, templates, 39 example diagrams (13 types × 3 variants)

author_info.name: Cathryn Lavery
author_info.bio: Writes about AI, entrepreneurship, and designing nice-looking things
